tier_rationale: 7-10 files cross-module (new post_session.rs + channels.rs + moc.rs, plus server.rs/lib.rs/main.rs/commands.rs edits). Touches app-startup path (.run -> .build().run callback). Detached process + user vault writes. Already decomposed into 3 spawnable phases, so L rather than XL-split.

rigor_applied.discovery_skipped_reason: Change already fully designed (design.md sections 4-6, Open Questions all closed, 3 M3 specs present). Mode B over existing slug, not raw idea.
rigor_applied.iprev_reason: files_estimate >= 5 triggers A3. Held at user's request (M3 blocked by M2 adjustments; user reviews plan first). Offer cross-model iprev on the bg-runner architecture before execute.

gate_reason: M2 (#7 vault search modal + #I @@ picker) still in manual testing by user. M3 must not begin until M2 adjustments are finalized.
open_items_for_execute: Spec/tasks divergence: post-session-runner spec lists 5 marker triggers (adds PTY-side EOF termination, spec line 30) but tasks.md 4.1.6-4.1.8 covers only 4. Reconcile before/during Phase C.
Risk #1 (design.md): bg process may not spawn in hardened distros. PID-check at 200ms post-spawn + synchronous-flush fallback + toast is mandatory, not optional.
Multi-instance: runner uses global post-session.lock + pending-mocs/. Manual E2E (tasks 6.4/6.5) requires closing the installed .deb.
